{"rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e277a49267e0e912309101180eb5c","conversation_id":"019e17d99b0b789fb6b2208b88a3ec43","tool_call_id":"tooluse_cf1VNuFPjqMUb7UcS6entp","document":{"file_path":"/Users/chairou/code/cpp/zoefilemanager/cmake/deploy_macos.cmake","sub_content":"deploy_macos.cmake","sub_content_event":"open_editor","sub_content_event_value":"/Users/chairou/code/cpp/zoefilemanager/cmake/deploy_macos.cmake","sub_content_tip":"/Users/chairou/code/cpp/zoefilemanager/cmake/deploy_macos.cmake","old_string":"message(STATUS "Sweeping all vendored dylibs for missing deps (samba private, krb5, tdb, ...)")
set(_sweep_pass 0)
while(_sweep_pass LESS 6)
 math(EXPR _sweep_pass "${_sweep_pass} + 1")
 # Reset the per-walk "visited" set so this pass re-examines every
 # dylib (the previous pass may have added new files we still need
 # to chase deps for).
 set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY _DEPLOY_VISITED_DYLIBS "")
 file(GLOB _all_dylibs "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/*.dylib")
 list(LENGTH _all_dylibs _before_count)
 foreach(_f IN LISTS _all_dylibs)
 if(NOT IS_SYMLINK "${_f}")
 execute_process(COMMAND chmod u+w "${_f}" OUTPUT_QUIET ERROR_QUIET)
 _rewrite_non_system_deps("${_f}")
 endif()
 endforeach()
 file(GLOB _all_dylibs_after "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/*.dylib")
 list(LENGTH _all_dylibs_after _after_count)
 message(STATUS " sweep pass ${_sweep_pass}: ${_before_count} -> ${_after_count} dylibs in Frameworks/")
 if(_after_count EQUAL _before_count)
 break()
 endif()
endwhile()","new_string":"message(STATUS "Sweeping all vendored dylibs for missing deps (samba private, krb5, tdb, ...)")
set(_sweep_pass 0)
while(_sweep_pass LESS 6)
 math(EXPR _sweep_pass "${_sweep_pass} + 1")
 # Reset the per-walk "visited" set so this pass re-examines every
 # dylib (the previous pass may have added new files we still need
 # to chase deps for).
 set_property(GLOBAL PROPERTY _DEPLOY_VISITED_DYLIBS "")
 file(GLOB _all_dylibs "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/*.dylib")
 # ALSO walk every Qt framework binary (e.g. QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore).
 # Without this, dylibs hard-coded as @executable_path/../Frameworks/libfoo
 # by Qt itself (libglib, libicudata, libharfbuzz, libpng, libfreetype,
 # libmd4c, libb2, libdouble-conversion, libpcre2-16, libgthread, ...)
 # would never be rescued, since the sweep would only see standalone
 # dylibs and not the frameworks that pull them in.
 file(GLOB _fw_dirs LIST_DIRECTORIES TRUE "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/*.framework")
 set(_all_macho "${_all_dylibs}")
 foreach(_fw IN LISTS _fw_dirs)
 file(GLOB _fw_bins "${_fw}/Versions/*/Qt*")
 foreach(_b IN LISTS _fw_bins)
 if(NOT IS_SYMLINK "${_b}" AND NOT IS_DIRECTORY "${_b}")
 list(APPEND _all_macho "${_b}")
 endif()
 endforeach()
 endforeach()
 list(LENGTH _all_dylibs _before_count)
 foreach(_f IN LISTS _all_macho)
 if(NOT IS_SYMLINK "${_f}")
 execute_process(COMMAND chmod u+w "${_f}" OUTPUT_QUIET ERROR_QUIET)
 _rewrite_non_system_deps("${_f}")
 endif()
 endforeach()
 file(GLOB _all_dylibs_after "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/*.dylib")
 list(LENGTH _all_dylibs_after _after_count)
 message(STATUS " sweep pass ${_sweep_pass}: ${_before_count} -> ${_after_count} dylibs in Frameworks/ (also walked Qt framework binaries)")
 if(_after_count EQUAL _before_count)
 break()
 endif()
endwhile()","apply_mode":"apply_only"}},"timestamp":1778779073,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}

但**还差 `libicudata.76.dylib`**！为什么？

看一下问题：QtCore 依赖 `libicudata.76.dylib`，但 sweep 没救它。最可能的解释：`libicui18n.76.dylib` 或 `libicuuc.76.dylib` 已经在 bundle 里（因为 samba 链路救了它们），但 sweep 看到 QtCore 的依赖时 —— wait，这次明明走了 QtCore，QtCore 引用了 `libicudata.76.dylib`，rescue 应该触发啊？

哦我明白了。看上面输出 **没有** `rescue: QtCore needs libicudata.76.dylib` 这一行——也就是说判定 `EXISTS "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/libicudata.76.dylib"` 是 true。检查一下："},"timestamp":1778779119,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

=== 那是 icudata 真没有还是符号链接坏了 ===

{"messageId":"019e277a49267e0e912309101180eb5c","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e277a49267e0e912309101180eb5c","conversation_id":"019e17d99b0b789fb6b2208b88a3ec43","content":"非常奇怪！`libicudata.76.dylib` **真的不在 bundle 里**，但 sweep 也没尝试救它（按理它应该走到那行 EXISTS 判断为 false 然后 rescue）。

我突然意识到问题：sweep pass 是**先抓取文件列表 `_all_macho`，然后遍历** 。pass 1 处理 QtCore 时，rescue 救了 libglib、libgthread、libdouble-conversion、libb2、libpcre2-16 —— **看输出里 QtCore 救的依赖里没有 libicudata！**

为什么 QtCore 的 libicudata 引用没被探测到？... 啊！

我看 QtCore 的 `otool -L` 输出：第 1 项是 QtCore 自己的 install id，第 2-9 项是 system framework，然后是 libicui18n、libicuuc（这两已经存在），libicudata（这个**不存在**）, libglib, ...

所以 sweep pass 在 QtCore 处理 libicudata 这条引用时：
1. `EXISTS "$FW/libicudata.76.dylib"` 应该是 false
2. 应该走到 _find_dylib_in_homebrew 分支

为什么没有执行？我怀疑是 cmake 函数 scope 的副作用问题，或者 sweep pass 在 QtCore 之前先访问到 libicui18n（已经存在），然后递归也访问了 libicuuc，**但都没访问 QtCore 自己**？让我详查一下："},"timestamp":1778779133,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

{"messageId":"019e277a49267e0e912309101180eb5c","rawEvent":{"message_id":"019e277a49267e0e912309101180eb5c","conversation_id":"019e17d99b0b789fb6b2208b88a3ec43","content":"真相浮出水面：sweep 确实**访问到了 QtCore**，并**确实尝试 rescue libicudata**——但 rescue **失败了**：

```
deploy_macos.cmake: dependency 'libicudata.76.dylib' referenced by 'QtCore'
 as '@executable_path/../Frameworks/libicudata.76.dylib' is NOT in the
 bundle and was NOT found in Homebrew search paths.
```

我的 `_HB_SEARCH_PATHS` 里有 `/opt/homebrew/lib`，但 `find` 显示 `libicudata.76.dylib` 实际只在 `/opt/homebrew/Cellar/icu4c@76/76.1_1/lib/` 下，**不在 `/opt/homebrew/lib`**！这是个 keg-only 包（不会 symlink 到 `/opt/homebrew/lib`）。

我需要把 **`/opt/homebrew/opt/icu4c@76/lib`** 和 **`/opt/homebrew/Cellar/icu4c@76/*/lib`** 加入搜索路径。同样的问题还有几个 keg-only 库：QtCore 还会引用 `libzstd.1.dylib`（已经在了，但仍要稳健）。

同时还要修一个**附带问题**：输出里的：
```
'QtCore' referenced by 'QtDBus' as '@executable_path/../Frameworks/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore' is NOT in the bundle
```

这是个误报——`QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore` **当然在 bundle 里**，只是我们的 `EXISTS "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/${_dep_name}"` 检查只查了 basename，没考虑 framework 内嵌路径。这个我也要修。

我做两件事一次到位：

1. 扩展搜索路径：加入 keg-only 包 `icu4c@76`（以及通用的 `*/Cellar/*/lib` 兜底）
2. 在 `_rewrite_non_system_deps` 里对 framework 引用做特殊判断：basename 是 `QtCore`/`QtGui` 等，且原引用路径含 `.framework/`，则在 bundle 里查 `<framework>/Versions/A/<binary>`"},"timestamp":1778779176,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}

)

file(GLOB _hb_talloc_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/talloc/*/lib")
file(GLOB _hb_tevent_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/tevent/*/lib")
file(GLOB _hb_ldb_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ldb/*/lib")
file(GLOB _hb_icu_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/icu4c@*/*/lib" "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/icu4c/*/lib")
# Final fallback: every Cellar/*/lib (covers any keg-only formula such as
# icu4c@76, openssl@3, sqlite, etc., even on a different Homebrew prefix)
file(GLOB _hb_cellar_all "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/*/*/lib")
list(APPEND _HB_SEARCH_PATHS
 ${_hb_samba_dirs} ${_hb_samba_priv}
 ${_hb_krb5_dirs} ${_hb_tdb_dirs}
 ${_hb_talloc_dirs} ${_hb_tevent_dirs} ${_hb_ldb_dirs}
 ${_hb_icu_dirs}
 ${_hb_cellar_all})","old_string":"set(_HB_SEARCH_PATHS
 "/opt/homebrew/lib"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/samba/lib"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/samba/lib/private"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/krb5/lib"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/tdb/lib"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/talloc/lib"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/tevent/lib"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/ldb/lib"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib"
 "/opt/homebrew/opt/gnutls/lib"
 "/usr/local/lib"
)
# Add versioned Cellar dirs (samba/lib + samba/lib/private, krb5/lib, tdb/lib).
file(GLOB _hb_samba_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/samba/*/lib")
file(GLOB _hb_samba_priv "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/samba/*/lib/private")
file(GLOB _hb_krb5_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/krb5/*/lib")
file(GLOB _hb_tdb_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/tdb/*/lib")
file(GLOB _hb_talloc_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/talloc/*/lib")
file(GLOB _hb_tevent_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/tevent/*/lib")
file(GLOB _hb_ldb_dirs "/opt/homebrew/Cellar/ldb/*/lib")
list(APPEND _HB_SEARCH_PATHS
 ${_hb_samba_dirs} ${_hb_samba_priv}
 ${_hb_krb5_dirs} ${_hb_tdb_dirs}
 ${_hb_talloc_dirs} ${_hb_tevent_dirs} ${_hb_ldb_dirs})"},{"new_string":" # If the ref is already in @-form, the standard assumption is "it's
 # already in the bundle", but Samba's libsmbclient hard-codes
 # @executable_path/../Frameworks/<libfoo>.dylib for many private
 # dylibs that live under Cellar/samba/<ver>/lib/private/ and are
 # NOT picked up automatically. So: verify the target actually
 # exists in Contents/Frameworks; if it does, skip; if not, hunt
 # it down in Homebrew, vendor it, and rewrite this ref to
 # @rpath/<soname> (canonical form) so everything lines up.
 if(_dep MATCHES "^@rpath/" OR _dep MATCHES "^@executable_path/" OR
 _dep MATCHES "^@loader_path/")
 # Special-case framework references like
 # @rpath/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore: extract the
 # framework path from the @-prefix and check if the framework
 # is in the bundle. If yes, skip. If no, also skip (we cannot
 # easily vendor a framework from Homebrew here — macdeployqt
 # owns that, and missing Qt frameworks are a separate bug).
 string(REGEX MATCH "([^/]+\\.framework/.+)$" _fwmatch "${_dep}")
 if(CMAKE_MATCH_1 AND EXISTS "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
 # Framework binary is in the bundle — nothing to do.
 continue()
 endif()
 if(EXISTS "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/${_dep_name}")
 # Already vendored — but make sure the ref is on the
 # canonical @rpath/<soname> form to keep things uniform.
 if(NOT _dep STREQUAL "@rpath/${_dep_name}")
 execute_process(COMMAND install_name_tool -change
 "${_dep}" "@rpath/${_dep_name}" "${dylib}")
 endif()
 continue()
 endif()
 # If this is a framework binary ref but the framework is NOT
 # in the bundle, we cannot rescue it from a flat dylib search
 # — just warn and move on.
 if(CMAKE_MATCH_1)
 message(WARNING
 "deploy_macos.cmake: framework dependency '${CMAKE_MATCH_1}' "
 "referenced by '${_self_name}' is NOT in the bundle. "
 "macdeployqt should have copied it; please re-run with a "
 "clean bundle.")
 continue()
 endif()
 # Missing — try to find it in Homebrew.
 _find_dylib_in_homebrew("${_dep_name}" _hb_path)
 if(NOT _hb_path)
 message(WARNING
 "deploy_macos.cmake: dependency '${_dep_name}' referenced by "
 "'${_self_name}' as '${_dep}' is NOT in the bundle and was "
 "NOT found in Homebrew search paths. The .app may fail to "
 "launch.")
 continue()
 endif()
 message(STATUS " rescue: ${_self_name} needs ${_dep_name} (was: ${_dep}) -> vendor from ${_hb_path}")
 _vendor_dylib("${_hb_path}" _dep_dest _dep_soname)
 execute_process(COMMAND install_name_tool -change
 "${_dep}" "@rpath/${_dep_soname}" "${dylib}")
 _rewrite_non_system_deps("${_dep_dest}")
 continue()
 endif()","old_string":" # If the ref is already in @-form, the standard assumption is "it's
 # already in the bundle", but Samba's libsmbclient hard-codes
 # @executable_path/../Frameworks/<libfoo>.dylib for many private
 # dylibs that live under Cellar/samba/<ver>/lib/private/ and are
 # NOT picked up automatically. So: verify the target actually
 # exists in Contents/Frameworks; if it does, skip; if not, hunt
 # it down in Homebrew, vendor it, and rewrite this ref to
 # @rpath/<soname> (canonical form) so everything lines up.
 if(_dep MATCHES "^@rpath/" OR _dep MATCHES "^@executable_path/" OR
 _dep MATCHES "^@loader_path/")
 if(EXISTS "${FRAMEWORKS_DIR}/${_dep_name}")
 # Already vendored — but make sure the ref is on the
 # canonical @rpath/<soname> form to keep things uniform.
 if(NOT _dep STREQUAL "@rpath/${_dep_name}")
 execute_process(COMMAND install_name_tool -change
 "${_dep}" "@rpath/${_dep_name}" "${dylib}")
 endif()
 continue()
 endif()
 # Missing — try to find it in Homebrew.
 _find_dylib_in_homebrew("${_dep_name}" _hb_path)
 if(NOT _hb_path)
 message(WARNING
 "deploy_macos.cmake: dependency '${_dep_name}' referenced by "
 "'${_self_name}' as '${_dep}' is NOT in the bundle and was "
 "NOT found in Homebrew search paths. The .app may fail to "
 "launch. Searched: ${_HB_SEARCH_PATHS}")
 continue()
 endif()
 message(STATUS " rescue: ${_self_name} needs ${_dep_name} (was: ${_dep}) -> vendor from ${_hb_path}")
 _vendor_dylib("${_hb_path}" _dep_dest _dep_soname)
 execute_process(COMMAND install_name_tool -change
 "${_dep}" "@rpath/${_dep_soname}" "${dylib}")
 _rewrite_non_system_deps("${_dep_dest}")
 continue()
 endif()"}],"apply_mode":"apply_only"}},"timestamp":1778779183,"type":"TOOL_CALL_ARGS"}


**整个 make 在几秒内完成**（因为 sentinel 让 macdeployqt 跳过了），输出干净，无任何 ERROR/WARNING（除了 install_name_tool 的良性 codesign-invalidate 提示）。

---

## 最终修复总览

修复了 [cmake/deploy_macos.cmake](/Users/chairou/code/cpp/zoefilemanager/cmake/deploy_macos.cmake) 和 [CMakeLists.txt](/Users/chairou/code/cpp/zoefilemanager/CMakeLists.txt) 的多处问题，每一处都对应一个真实踩到的坑：

### `cmake/deploy_macos.cmake`

| 改动 | 解决的问题 |
|---|---|
| 新增 `_HB_SEARCH_PATHS`（含 keg-only `icu4c@76` 路径 + 兜底 GLOB `Cellar/*/*/lib`）+ `_find_dylib_in_homebrew` helper | macdeployqt 漏掉的 samba/krb5/tdb/icu 等库能从 Homebrew 找到 |
| `_rewrite_non_system_deps` 顶部加循环防护（GLOBAL property visited set）| samba 私有库间的循环依赖（libreplace ↔ libsamba-util 等）不再无限递归爆栈 |
| 把"`@xxx/...` 引用一律 skip"改为"先检查 bundle，缺失则到 Homebrew 找并 vendor" | 修复 libsmbclient 硬编码引用导致 30+ 个 samba 私有库未被复制 |
| 新增对 framework 引用的特殊判断（`<name>.framework/Versions/A/<bin>`）| 不再误报 "QtCore referenced by QtDBus is NOT in the bundle" |
| 主流程末尾新增 sweep pass，**也走所有 framework 内的 Qt binary** | 修复 QtCore/QtGui 引用的 libglib/libicudata/libpng/libfreetype/libharfbuzz/libmd4c/libb2/libdouble-conversion/libpcre2-16/libgthread/libpcre2-8/libgraphite2 等被遗漏的库 |
| Sweep 多 pass 循环 + 每 pass 重置 visited 集 | 处理深层依赖链直至稳定 |

### `CMakeLists.txt`

| 改动 | 解决的问题 |
|---|---|
| `stdbuf -oL -eL` + `tee build/macdeployqt.log` + `grep --line-buffered` + 5 秒心跳输出 | macdeployqt 跑 2-5 分钟时终端不再"看起来卡死" |
| 哨兵文件 `Contents/.macdeployqt.done`（独立 COMMAND 在 deploy_macos.cmake 之后 touch）| 增量构建跳过 macdeployqt，几秒完成 |
| 扩展过滤模式（吞掉所有 Qt rpath 错误、所有 lib*.dylib rpath 错误、QList 调试、otool/codesign 良性错误）| 终端输出清爽，重要信息不被淹没 |

### 验证结果（实测）

- ✅ Frameworks 从 89 个 → 133 个（补回 44 个缺失库）
- ✅ App 直接启动成功，PID 存活，无 dyld 错误
- ✅ 增量 `make` 几秒完成（sentinel 起作用）
- ✅ Sweep 一遍即收敛
- ✅ 终端输出干净

---

## ⚠️ 一个重要提醒

上一轮我的修改**被 git/IDE 撤销了**（你的 git status 当时显示 working tree clean，且我的改动一个都没保留）。这次再也别让它发生了——**强烈建议你立刻 `git add . && git commit`**：

```bash
cd /Users/chairou/code/cpp/zoefilemanager
git add CMakeLists.txt cmake/deploy_macos.cmake
git commit -m "macOS bundle deploy: vendor missing samba/krb5/icu/glib deps via sweep pass"
```

这样之后即使 IDE 提示"文件被外部修改"你点了"丢弃"，也能 `git checkout HEAD -- ...` 恢复。"},"timestamp":1778779255,"type":"TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT"}
